narrative_role: Atto I, dettaglio della competenza — il sapere nelle mani.

prompt_components.shot_type: Macro close-up montage (3 quick shots within 6 seconds)
prompt_components.subject: weathered, callused hands doing specialized work
prompt_components.action: shot 1 (2s): hands tying a complex sailor's knot from coarse rope; shot 2 (2s): hands writing on yellowed parchment with a quill in elegant antique calligraphy; shot 3 (2s): hands gripping a polished wooden ship's wheel, slight rotational movement
prompt_components.environment: natural shipboard lighting, slight texture of wood and rope visible, backgrounds soft and blurred
prompt_components.camera_movement: each shot is static macro, no movement within shots; cuts between shots
prompt_components.lighting: warm side-lighting that emphasizes texture and weathering of skin
prompt_components.mood: intimate, respectful, the gravitas of skill
prompt_components.audio_hint: rope friction sound, quill scratching, leather grip squeak on wood, no music, very intimate sonic close-ups

acceptance_criteria: Le mani devono sembrare ESPERTE, vecchie, segnate
I tre tagli devono essere visibili come 3 momenti distinti
